response: TO FIND THE FINAL WEIGHT, WE CALCULATE W TIMES (0.98) RAISED TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE THE GOAL, ALEX NEEDS TO ADD ENOUGH ITEMS TO REACH THE TARGET. CHECK THE CLOCK TO SEE HOW LONG IT TAKES. CHECK THE CLOCK AGAIN FOR TIME REMAINING. CHECK THE CLOCK ONE MORE TIME TO CONFIRM. THE MINIMUM NUMBER REQUIRED IS FOUND BY SOLVING THE EQUATION FOR N.
